course_description.overview: Multi-day cycling festival in the Atlas Mountains near Agadir, featuring road routes through spectacular landscapes, mountains, palm groves, and Berber villages with cultural immersion.

key_segments.name: Challenging pass
key_segments.description: 1495 m elevation gain overall with a challenging pass at km 26, long climb to 940m altitude.

key_segments.name: Mountain loop
key_segments.description: Intense section with peak climb at 940m altitude, winding roads and panoramic views.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Winding ascents, mountain passes, and a demanding finale testing mind and muscles; 120km with 1800m elevation, 80km with 1100m, 40km with 287m.

logistics.getting_there: Start and finish in Taroudant; exhibitors' village for kit collection.
logistics.registration_details: €85 for 120km, €70 for 80km, €55 for 40km; requires medical certificate; registration opened January.
logistics.bike_logistics: Luggage transport, mechanical support, group warm-ups and recon sessions; hard helmet, water bottle, repair kit required; no triathlon/TT bars.
logistics.local_considerations: Professional guidance, meals provided; cultural discovery in Morocco.

final_verdict.one_liner: Morocco's premier road sportive blending epic Atlas climbs with cultural adventure.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Cyclists seeking challenging road rides, stunning scenery, and Moroccan immersion; all levels with distance options.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for the unique combination of sportive challenge, support, and off-bike experiences.
pro_tips: Bring medical certificate for bib collection.
Prepare for gravel sections on road bike.
Join recon sessions to adapt to terrain.
